response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role. He brings 20+ years of experience with deep TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB expertise across multiple production environments, and his current role at re:cinq directly maps to the JD: fullstack work, AI agent infrastructure, and MCP framework development. He is a committed TDD practitioner who has built testing tools and run workshops — indicating genuine testing maturity rather than surface-level familiarity. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest mentions, and his Java/Kotlin experience appears shallow, but the overall profile is well above the bar for mid-senior fullstack.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack track record across multiple production roles with real scale (millions of requests/s at Dunnhumby, millions of mail pieces at Optilyz)
Hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience in current role at re:cinq, directly matching the JD's AI agent development requirement
Exceptional testing culture: TDD advocate, author of Fluent-Asserts and Trial test libraries, Selenium and functional programming workshop instructor
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js anywhere on the resume — primary required framework for the backend
Vitest not listed; testing experience leans toward custom D-language frameworks and Jest-adjacent tools rather than the specified stack
Java/Kotlin exposure appears limited and non-primary (used for robotic arms at Altom in 2016–2018); secondary stack requirement is weakly covered

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js/React depth across multiple senior roles
